briefs.title: BC Horse Racing Regulation Takes Effect April 2026 — New Betting and Licensing Rules
briefs.summary: BC's Gaming Control Act General Manager has created a new Horse Racing Regulation, effective April 13, 2026. It sets rules for betting types, defines who holds an interest in a horse, and establishes licence classes for race tracks, teletheatres, and wagering services.
briefs.action_required: Review the new Horse Racing Regulation before April 13, 2026 to ensure your licence class and betting practices comply.

key_dates.label: BC Horse Racing Regulation takes effect — Gaming Control Act

briefs.industries: Finance & Insurance, Natural Resources, Professional Services
